generator.title: Generate Timetable
generator.adjacencyHint: When enabled, repeated subjects on the same day are placed in consecutive periods.
generator.generatingHint: This may take up to 5 minutes. You can navigate away — you'll be notified when it's done.
generator.confirmRegenerate: Existing timetable will be overwritten. Continue?

editor.title: Timetable
editor.description: View and edit the timetable grid.
editor.mobileHint: Editing is available on desktop. Use landscape or a larger screen for drag-and-drop.
